mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BL_COMMENT_REPORTS (REPORT_ID, COMMENT_ID, REPORTER_ID, REASON_TYPE, REASON_TEXT, STATUS, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_BL_COMMENT_REPORTS.NEXTVAL, #{commentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reporterId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reasonType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reasonText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE BL_COMMENT_REPORTS SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HANDLED_BY = #{handledBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, HANDLED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
